rag_rules: When AGREE reports '<error>' type issues, trace the first unresolved identifier on the same line and fix or remove the invalid clause.
If a guarantee expression has type '<error>', ensure all referenced identifiers are visible and properly typed in the same annex.
generic_rules: Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex for AGREE expressions.
Ensure AGREE scalar type declarations use int, real, or bool; avoid package-qualified or invalid type names.
For component type contracts, avoid implementation-only subcomponent paths in annexes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be placed in valid annex scopes: component types for assumptions/guarantees, implementations for bindings.
Binary expressions in guarantees must have bool-typed left sides; comparisons yield bool.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers or types not present in the AADL model's configured dependencies.
Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type annexes unless represented through visible variables.
